Nashville Food menu
View fullsize
No trip to Nashville is complete without getting a Nashville Hot Chicken sandwich with fresh farm egg gribiche,
Extra Easy
cheese and
Hippies & Cowboys IPA
-brined pickles.
Our fresh Beet Salad made with kale, marinated beets and burrata. Grilled or Nashville hot chicken can be added to this salad too!
ORDER CURBSIDE PICKUP
ORDER GRUBHUB
Our famous Five Beer Burger featuring Creekstone Farms Beef, an
Extra Easy
bun, white cheddar cheese,
Southern Wit
comeback sauce,
Basil Ryeman
ketchup,
Imperial Porter
onions and Cutaway pickles.
The bacon buffalo wings and our
State Park Blonde
ranch are delicious!
